narrative:
Austintown Twp township has 24,193 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 32.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 21.3 percentage points.
